drafts.headline: Edmonton Bears Add Jace
drafts.subheadline: The Edmonton Bears have added #12 Jace to their active roster.
drafts.body_markdown:
The Edmonton Bears have added #12 Jace to their active roster ahead of upcoming Summer 2026 regular-season play.

The move gives the Edmonton Bears another option as they continue to shape their roster for the current campaign.

Further details may be added by SPL staff.
drafts.writer_notes: This was the first test of the transac tool.

drafts.headline: Long Island Lightning Make Roster Moves
drafts.subheadline: Long Island Signs Kajun, Places Sum1 on LTIR
drafts.body_markdown:
Following last season’s semifinal exit and continued injury concerns surrounding star player Sum1, the Long Island Lightning have placed Sum1 on LTIR and signed veteran Kajun to the active roster.

The move reunites Kajun with longtime teammates Jagr and Milk, a trio that has captured five Erveon Cup championships together. Throughout the off-season, Kajun has been spotted practicing and scrimmaging with the team, making his return less of a surprise than the timing of the transaction. His familiarity with the organization and established chemistry with the roster make him a natural fit as Long Island looks to reinforce its lineup. 

Kajun has proven he can still produce at the top level, recording 75 points in just nine Pro games last season. His addition gives the Lightning another experienced option at the 3 position as the club begins its pursuit of another Erveon Cup championship.
